body.title: Fix missing unseen_university.test_minions after rename
body.result: unseen_university.test_minions.cc1 + fixtures/sprint_claim restored; 5 unit tests pass
body.intention: I intend that tests/igor/test_cc1_minion.py can import unseen_university.test_minions.cc1 after the agent_datacenter rename.
body.description:
The agent_datacenter→UnseenUniversity rename did not migrate the test_minions package. tests/igor/test_cc1_minion.py imports from unseen_university.test_minions.cc1 which does not exist — the module was at agent_datacenter/test_minions/ before the rename.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/test_minions/ (create or verify), tests/igor/test_cc1_minion.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** Restore the test_minions package at the correct path. No new features.
**Completion criteria:** python3 -m pytest tests/igor/test_cc1_minion.py passes (or correctly skips the integration test requiring ANTHROPIC_API_KEY).
